## Feature Description
What feature would you like added to Zap?

## Example Code
Show what the syntax should look like:
```zap
// how you want to write it in Zap
```

## Why Is This Useful?
Explain why this feature would help developers.

## Alternatives
Any other ways to achieve this currently?
